description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage container with a modern, slightly faceted shape and a metallic screw cap. The front label features vibrant images of assorted fruits, including an apple, orange, and pineapple, with the prominent branding 'Paradise cocktail' in bold white and blue text. The packaging is predominantly white with blue accents and water splash graphics, giving a refreshing and cool impression. The sides display detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode, while the back is densely covered with fine print. The bottle appears to be made of a semi-rigid, translucent plastic, allowing some visibility of the liquid inside. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban retail environments.
description: A rectangular, semi-translucent plastic bottled water with vibrant fruit graphics and detailed labeling, topped with a metallic screw cap.
description_view_0: Side view showing mostly white surface with partial blue branding and some nutritional text.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main 'Paradise cocktail' branding, colorful fruit images, and a green quality seal.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a barcode and additional product information.
description_view_3: Back view densely covered with nutritional facts and fine print text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'Paradise cocktail' in large white and blue text, fruit images, a green quality seal, and a red sun logo at the top. Side and back labels include nutritional facts, barcode, and fine print in black and blue text.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap, metallic silver color, short and cylindrical with ridged edges for grip.
attribute_transparency: Translucent plastic, allowing partial visibility of the liquid inside, with no distinct patterns or gradients.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly tapered neck with visible threading for the screw cap, no additional flares or ridges.
